# ctyun_ports (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10026730/10225195



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_ports" "port_data" {
}

output "ctyun_ports_value" {
  value = data.ctyun_ports.port_data
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `device_id` (String) 设备ID，用于过滤绑定到指定设备的网卡
- `page_no` (Number) 页码，从1开始，默认为1
- `page_size` (Number) 每页记录数，取值范围1-50，默认为10
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID
- `subnet_id` (String) 子网ID，用于过滤指定子网下的网卡
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID，用于过滤指定VPC下的网卡

### Read-Only

- `network_interfaces` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_interfaces))

<a id="nestedatt--network_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_interfaces`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) 网卡描述
- `id` (String) 网卡ID
- `instance_id` (String) 绑定的实例ID
- `instance_type` (String) 实例类型
- `ipv6_addresses` (List of String) IPv6地址列表
- `mac_address` (String) MAC地址
- `name` (String) 网卡名称
- `port_id` (String) 网卡ID
- `primary_private_ip` (String) 主私有IP地址
- `secondary_private_ips` (List of String) 辅助私有IP地址列表
- `security_group_ids` (List of String) 安全组ID列表
- `status` (String) 网卡状态
- `subnet_id` (String) 子网ID
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID
